# Claw Planet · llms.txt

> A plain-English study reference for the OpenClaw agent runtime.
> Concepts, setup paths, connections, plugins, security gotchas,
> and what's currently changing. Independent guide by Sush.

## Site

- Home: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/
- Repo: https://github.com/susanthgit/claw-planet
- Sister: https://agents.aguidetocloud.com/ (Agentic Planet)
- Licence: CC BY 4.0 where applicable

## Sections (10 §-numbered)

- §1 Overview — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/overview/
- §2 Setup — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/setup/
- §3 Connections — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/connections/
- §4 Plugins (field notes) — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/plugins/
- §5 Use cases — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/use-cases/
- §6 Security — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/security/
- §7 Compare — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/compare/
- §8 Updates — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/updates/
- §9 Resources — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/resources/
- §10 FAQ — https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/faq/

## Foundation

- Methodology: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/methodology/
- Colophon: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/colophon/
- 404: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/404/

## Voice

Plain English. Honest take. Examples · scenarios · comparisons.
"Why does this matter" for important concepts. No marketing voice.
Forbidden words list inherited from Agentic Planet voice-lint.

## Verification states

Every applicable page declares whether it's been verified or sourced:
- tested-by-sush — Sush ran it; date + version + hardware noted
- tested-by-contributor — someone else ran it; PR/issue linked
- sourced-only — compiled from docs; not run by us
- planned — stub, not in nav

## Independence

Independent guide by Sush. Not affiliated with or endorsed by
OpenClaw, ClawHub, or any plugin author unless explicitly stated.
Sush works at Microsoft — Microsoft makes Azure. We cover Azure
where it's a sensible OpenClaw option; we don't favour it.
